title: BarUniformlyDistributedLoad
description: BarUniformlyDistributedLoad: Uniformly distributed load applied to Bars. Can be used to apply force and/or moments.

Force.description: Force per length unit to be applied to the full length of the Bar. The load requires the Force and/or the Moment Vector to be non-zero to have any effect. Property has a quantity of type ForcePerUnitLength measured in [N/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Moment.description: Moment per length unit to be applied to the full length of the Bar. The load requires the Force and/or the Moment Vector to be non-zero to have any effect. Property has a quantity of type MomentPerUnitLength measured in [N.m/m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which the load is applied. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Objects.description: The group of Bars that the load should be applied to. For most analysis packages the objects added here need to be pulled from the analysis package before being assigned to the load.

Axis.description: Defines whether the load is applied in local or global coordinates.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the element. This means that the load will be reduced when its direction is at an angle to the element.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
